headline: Robot railcar tech firm adds former Wabtec CEO
summary: Intramotev, the technology company building autonomous railcars, said that former Chief Executive Ray Betler of locomotive manufacturer Wabtec has joined its board as an independent director. Betler worked as an engineer at Westinghouse, where he became the youngest head of engineering and later president and CEO in the company’s 120-year history. He joined Wabtec (NYSE: […] The post Robot railcar tech firm adds former Wabtec CEO appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: 1 Cash-Producing Stock to Target This Week and 2 We Turn Down
summary: A company that generates cash isn’t automatically a winner. Some businesses stockpile cash but fail to reinvest wisely, limiting their ability to expand.
